001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity;
002
003import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
004import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonPropertyOrder;
005import jakarta.persistence.Column;
006import jakarta.persistence.Entity;
007import jakarta.persistence.FetchType;
008import jakarta.persistence.GeneratedValue;
009import jakarta.persistence.GenerationType;
010import jakarta.persistence.Id;
011import jakarta.persistence.OneToMany;
012import jakarta.persistence.OrderBy;
013import jakarta.persistence.Table;
014import jakarta.persistence.UniqueConstraint;
015import java.util.LinkedList;
016import java.util.List;
017
018/**
019 * JPA entity representing the accepted-state/status associated with an {@link IssueReport}.
020 */
021@Entity
022@Table(
023  name = "accepted_state",
024  uniqueConstraints = {
025    @UniqueConstraint(name = "uk_accepted_state_status_tag", columnNames = "status_tag")
026  }
027)
028@JsonPropertyOrder({"statusTag", "statusTagDescription"})
029public class AcceptedState {
030
031  @Id
032  @Column(name = "accepted_state_id", updatable = false)
033  @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
034  @JsonIgnore
035  private Long id;
036
037  @Column(nullable = false)
038  private String statusTag;
039
040  @Column(nullable = false)
041  private String statusTagDescription;
042
043  // used AI to help with OneToMany annotation
044  @OneToMany(mappedBy = "acceptedState", fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
045  @OrderBy("timeLastModified DESC")
046  @JsonIgnore
047  private final List<IssueReport> issueReports = new LinkedList<>();
048
049  /**
050   * Returns the database identifier for this accepted state.
051   *
052   * @return primary key value.
053   */
054  public Long getId() {
055    return id;
056  }
057
058  /**
059   * Returns the status tag value.
060   *
061   * @return status tag.
062   */
063  public String getStatusTag() {
064    return statusTag;
065  }
066
067  /**
068   * Sets the status tag value.
069   *
070   * @param statusTag status tag.
071   */
072  public void setStatusTag(String statusTag) {
073    this.statusTag = statusTag;
074  }
075
076  /**
077   * Returns the human-readable status description.
078   *
079   * @return status description.
080   */
081  public String getStatusTagDescription() {
082    return statusTagDescription;
083  }
084
085  /**
086   * Sets the human-readable status description.
087   *
088   * @param statusTagDescription status description.
089   */
090  public void setStatusTagDescription(String statusTagDescription) {
091    this.statusTagDescription = statusTagDescription;
092  }
093
094  /**
095   * Returns the issue reports currently associated with this accepted state.
096   *
097   * @return associated issue reports.
098   */
099  @JsonIgnore
100  public List<IssueReport> getIssueReports() {
101    return issueReports;
102  }
103}
